estimand: one-shot field-level and whole-package conformance under one explicit source-only model-facing serialization/example strategy

design_rationale.uncertainty: whether the frozen output contract is usable by a model without task hindsight
design_rationale.anti_narrowing: three synthetic structures test reusable interface mechanics and do not define a domain scope
design_rationale.useful_completion: immutable one-shot denominators and independent field-level adjudication without repair

interface_strategy.key_representation_rule: primitive content is a JSON string that serializes source structure into a concise sentence
interface_strategy.example_role: shape and typing only; unrelated to every measured case

cases.structure: three-proposition gate with all primitive types
four-proposition dependency graph, no contradiction, multiple thresholds and artifacts
exception pathways with contradiction, zero thresholds, and three failures

held_out_boundary: case-heldout bytes and role are frozen before any call; no prompt, strategy, contract, source, policy, validator, or adjudication change is permitted after any outcome

generation_configuration.prompt_contract: read only four allowlisted source/interface files; write only outputs/package.json

prerequisite_gates.source_task_separation: pilot contains no task, private-check, control, assignment, or executor input; preflight must pass
prerequisite_gates.provider_requirement: both latest pinned provider records completed, cost_status included, estimated_cost_usd 0.0, model/provider exact
prerequisite_gates.protocol_wide_failure_rule: make zero calls if any pre-call gate fails; after a service-invalid or non-included/nonzero-cost attempt, retain it and stop before later cases

denominators.attempted: count cases with one launched provider attempt
denominators.service_valid: count attempted cases with completed=true, failed=false, launcher returncode zero, included USD 0.00
denominators.schema_valid: count service-valid cases accepted by the independent frozen validator

invalid_rule: retain untouched bytes and all logs; count the intended and attempted case; do not repair, retry, substitute, or reclassify schema rejection as interface success
